text.title: RTO/RPO Tracking Board Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example of a filled `rto-rpo-tracking-board` artefact showing every required field populated with realistic values and named evidence anchors.

example.note: Each evidence entry carries a claim plus a resolvable link; owner is a named person plus role; last_reviewed is current.
owner is a team handle; evidence array is empty; required fields missing. Validator rejects.
